name: css etc
format:
<style>

.filled { height: 48px !important;padding: 0 !important; margin: 0 !important;}
.nr-dashboard-template { padding: 0; margin: 0; background-color:black}
.rounded { border-radius: 12px 12px 12px 12px;}
.bigfont { font-size: 18px;}
.smallfont { font-size: 12px;}
.thedays { cursor:pointer; vertical-align:bottom; height:48px; }
.the2px  { background-color: #9E9E9E; height:2px; }
.theblocks {width:100%; height:0%; background-color:#4CAF50; }
.greybuttons { background-color:#cecac536 !important; width:48px; border: none;}
.thetemps { cursor:pointer; font-size:50%; color:#9E9E9E !important; } // Size caratteri temp
.smallheadings { color:blue; font-size:100%; }

</style>

<script>
var current=1;

$('.vibrate').on('click', function() {
  navigator.vibrate(100);
});

function restore_bg(x) {
            $(this).css("background-color", x);
    };

$('.touched').on('mousedown', function() {
    
    var x= $(this).css("background-color");
    $(this).css("background-color", "yellow");
    
    setTimeout(restore_bg.bind(this,x),50);
    navigator.vibrate(80);
    });
    
</script>
